$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for merge-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: MergeAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a merge agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

pr_number.description: Pull request number that was merged.

merge_sha.description: SHA of the resulting merge commit; empty when nothing merged (FAILED/SKIPPED).

merged_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the merge landed; empty when nothing merged (FAILED/SKIPPED).

block_reason.description: Additive (Story 12.3-003): why a non-MERGED merge was blocked. 'BLOCKED_HIGH_RISK' signals the run is awaiting human approval (PR carries risk:high with no risk-approved label / risk-approver review) rather than a fixable failure.

then.$comment: A successful merge must carry a real SHA and timestamp; a non-merged outcome (FAILED/SKIPPED, e.g. a high-risk approval block) need not.
